session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report results. Show any failures in full detail. Focus on whether the ruff/lint issues from the previous run are fixed.
session.assistant: I'll run `make fast-ci` and report the results, focusing on whether the ruff/lint issues from the previous run are fixed.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to check linting and tests

session.tool_result:

session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` run has completed with **mixed results**. Here's a detailed breakdown:
## Summary
**Overall Result**: FAILED (Exit code 2)
### Checks Status:
| Check | Status | Details | |-------|--------|---------| | **Lint (ruff)** | PASSED | All checks passed | | **Format Check (ruff format)** | PASSED | 1627 files already formatted | | **Prettier** | FAILED | Code style issues found in 2 files | | **Markdown** | PASSED | | | **Exec Reference** | PASSED | `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date | | **Type Check (ty)** | PASSED | All checks passed | | **Unit Tests (erk)** | PASSED | 5487 passed in 11.33s | | **Unit Tests (erk-dev)** | PASSED | 136 passed in 4.33s | | **Unit Tests (erk-statusline)** | PASSED | 112 passed in 0.78s | | **Unit Tests (erkbot)** | PASSED | 114 passed in 1.54s |
### Prettier Issues (Blocking Failure)
Two markdown files need formatting: 1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Note**: The **ruff linting issues from the previous run are FIXED**. The linter now passes with "All checks passed!" The only remaining failure is the Prettier formatting issue with 2 markdown documentation files.
